narrative.headline: What 2017 Subaru Outback owners report most
narrative.summary: Electrical system complaints make up the largest share of owner reports, frequently describing abnormal sounds on startup alongside unresolved dealer diagnoses. Visibility and wiper issues form the second-largest category, with owners citing dashboard glare that distracts from driving. Powertrain and engine concerns appear less frequently but include reports of unintended vehicle movement and abnormal noises.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report a loud, abnormal sound when the vehicle is started, with dealers often unable to determine the cause. · 1 fire · 5 crash · 4 injured

issues.title: Visibility/Wiper
issues.blurb: Owners report glare from outside the vehicle reflecting off the navigation system face plate while driving, causing distraction. · 2 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle continuing to move backward after shifting from reverse into drive, with repeated shift attempts failing to immediately correct the movement. · 2 crash
